subject: Accounting
title: Receipt Scanning and OCR
description: A fast breakdown of Receipt Scanning and OCR for builders.

hook.text: Snap a photo of a receipt. The app reads the vendor, date, and amount automatically.

buildup.text: Optical character recognition (OCR) converts images of receipts into structured financial data.

discovery.text: The data auto-fills expense entries—reducing manual typing and lost-receipt headaches.

twist.text: OCR isn't perfect—faded ink, wrinkled paper, and unusual formats still cause misreads.

climax.text: Combined with cloud storage, digital receipts create a permanent, searchable archive.

punchline.text: Snap, scan, done. Paper receipts are going extinct.

quiz.question: What does OCR technology do for bookkeeping?
options: Converts receipt images into structured financial data
Replaces the need for bank accounts
